title: hieracium cydoniifolium subsp. epileion
intro: Hieracium cydoniifolium subsp. epileion is a subspecies of the Hieracium cydoniifolium plant, which is a flowering perennial found in the Mediterranean region and is also known as Hawkweed. This plant is traditionally used in herbal medicine, and it is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Hieracium cydoniifolium subsp. epileion include reducing inflammation and promoting wound healing, as well as treating digestive issues and menstrual cramps. Herbal preparations of this plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be used to treat various health conditions, although further research is needed to confirm its effectiveness.
